name: Excel to SQL Migration
description: Precisely map and transfer Excel data into SQL schemas (MS SQL, MySQL, or PostgreSQL).
detailed_description: The Excel to SQL Migration tool is designed for precision-heavy data transitions. It maps Excel columns to SQL schemas automatically, ensuring that no ingredient is lost in translation. Ideal for large-scale data ingestion and legacy system migrations.

name: Sentiment Analysis
description: Gourmet NLP recipe for dissecting emotional seasoning from raw feedback data.
detailed_description: A sophisticated NLP recipe for dissecting customer feedback. It leverages pre-trained models (NLTK) to extract sentiment scores and keyword insights. Features built-in language detection and gourmet diagnostic logs.

name: Textual Keyword Extractor
description: High-speed filtering tool for isolating mission-critical records from legacy CSV files.
detailed_description: Act like a master filter for your data. This script searches massive CSV datasets for specific keywords (e.g., medical terms, error codes) and exports refined 'nuggets' of information for further analysis.

name: MSSQL Database Schema Analyzer
description: Deep-scan diagnostics for Microsoft SQL Server architectures, producing structural PDF reports.
detailed_description: A powerful structural diagnostic tool. It connects to your SQL Server instance, analyzes table relationships, and generates comprehensive documentation, including Entity-Relationship Diagrams (ERD).
